notes: Derived from the verb 'verwalten' (to administer/manage). Can refer to a government body, an administrative department, or the act of managing something.

sentences.german: Die Verwaltung der Stadt hat neue Regeln eingeführt.
sentences.english: The city administration has introduced new rules.

sentences.german: Er arbeitet seit zehn Jahren in der öffentlichen Verwaltung.
sentences.english: He has been working in public administration for ten years.

sentences.german: Die Verwaltung des Gebäudes liegt in den Händen einer privaten Firma.
sentences.english: The management of the building is in the hands of a private company.
